common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.notFoundHint: Check the link or ask the host for a fresh one.

landing.heroTitle:
Every Guest.
Every Angle.
One Gallery
landing.heroSub: Kormem is a premium, private photo sharing app for events. Guests join via QR (no download), snap memorable photos, and the album reveals after the event.
landing.heroAlt: Confetti falling over a celebrating crowd at night
landing.howTitle: How a Day Becomes a Film.
landing.step1Text: A date, a name and a shot count. The QR code is ready immediately.
landing.step2Text: The camera opens from a link, right in the browser. No apps, no accounts.
landing.step3Title: The host opens the gallery whenever they want
landing.step3Text: At the moment the host chooses, every photo appears for everyone at once: the whole night through every guest's eyes.
landing.stylesTitle: Three film styles to choose from
landing.stylesSub: The style shows in the viewfinder before the shot. The original is always stored clean.
landing.stylesPhotoAlt: A groom lifting his bride against the sunset
landing.planFreeText: All film styles, the shared gallery, the reveal and printable QR cards. No subscriptions, no fees.
landing.faq1q: Do guests need to install an app?
landing.faq1a: No. The camera opens right in the browser from a link or QR code. Works on iPhone and Android, including budget models.
landing.faq2a: Whenever you decide: instantly, at the end of the night, or at your own time, say 10:00 the next morning. Until then only you can see them.
landing.faq3q: A guest shot with a filter. Can I get the original?
landing.faq3a: Yes. The original is always stored clean at full resolution; the style is only laid over it at display time.
landing.faq4a: Kormem is free. No subscriptions and no per-event fees.
landing.faq5a: In private storage. Access opens only through your event link and only after the reveal. Download the archive and they are yours forever.
landing.ctaTitle: Let the reveal show your day
landing.occasionsTitle:
Memories worth keeping,
from every angle.
landing.occasionsBody: A wedding, a birthday, a corporate night, a reunion: wherever people gather, Kormem hands them one shared film roll. No apps, no accounts. Every guest gets the QR code, and that is the whole setup.
landing.modesTitle: Three ways to leave a memory
landing.modesSub: All in the browser camera, all counted on the same film roll.
landing.modePhotoText: Film styles preview live in the viewfinder before the shot.
landing.modeVoiceText: A spoken message for the hosts. Guests hear themselves before sending, one wish per guest.
landing.howSub: Three screens on a guest's phone: join, shoot, and the reveal.
landing.phoneNoApp: No app, no sign-up. Your shots join the shared gallery.
landing.useCasesTitle: “Not every gallery needs a special day.”
landing.tryText: Scan with your phone: the camera opens in the browser and you can take a shot right away. No download needed.

auth.title: Sign in to Kormem
auth.subtitle: The host dashboard: events, QR codes and galleries.
auth.linkSentHint: Open the email at {email} and follow the link on this device.
auth.noPassword: No passwords: a link to your email, or Google sign-in.

auth.linkSpamHint: No email after a minute? Check the spam folder.
auth.photoCaption: Every guest becomes a photographer. The gallery opens when you say so.

dashboard.title: Your events
dashboard.emptyText: Create your first event. The QR code and the guest camera will be ready in a minute.

create.subtitle: A minute of setup and the camera is ready for your guests.

create.shotsHint: The fewer the shots, the more each one matters.
create.guestsHint: The QR code stops accepting new guests past this number. Leave empty for unlimited.
create.revealInstantHint: Shots appear in the gallery right after capture
create.revealEventEndHint: The gallery opens when the event ends
create.styleHint: The starting style of the guest camera. Originals are always stored clean.
create.allowedHint: Turn styles off to keep the gallery consistent. The default style is always available.
create.coverHint: The first screen guests see after scanning the QR. Your event name, in one of three designs.

event.hostOnlyNote: visible only to you until the reveal

guest.nameHint: Your name appears under your shots in the shared gallery
guest.noAppNeeded: No app, no sign-up. Your shots open in the shared gallery.
guest.privacyLink: What happens to my photos and voice?
guest.installTitle: Keep the camera one tap away
guest.installText: Add this event to your home screen: it opens straight into the camera, full screen.
guest.installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then "Add to Home Screen". It opens straight into the camera.

gallery.lockedText: The gallery opens {time}. Nobody sees it earlier, not even us.

guestList.title: Guests
guestList.empty: Nobody has joined yet. Once guests scan the QR code, they appear here.

meta.title: Kormem: the shared camera for any celebration
meta.description: Guests capture photos, short clips and voice wishes right in the browser. Everything stays hidden until the reveal, then the whole night opens in one shared gallery.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: Kormem is a shared event camera. This page explains, in plain words, what we store and who can see it. Kormem is free: there are no payments, so we never touch payment data.
privacy.s1Body: Photos, short video clips and voice recordings that guests capture on purpose. These show and record real people. Alongside them: the name a guest enters (any name works), an anonymous session token, upload timestamps, and the event details the host provides. Hosts sign in with an email address or Google account.
privacy.s2Body: Before the reveal, only the event's host sees the captures, and they can delete any of them. After the reveal, everyone with the event link sees the shared gallery. Media files live in private storage; every view goes through short-lived signed links, and nothing is ever public or indexed.
privacy.s3Body: Until the host deletes it. Deleting a single capture removes it immediately; deleting an event removes its guest list and all of its media. We recommend hosts download the gallery archive and then delete events they no longer need.
privacy.s4Body: Two are ours: a session cookie on the event page that remembers a guest's name and shot count (clearing it makes you a new guest), and a cookie that remembers your language. Hosts also get a sign-in session cookie from our auth provider, Supabase. No advertising or cross-site tracking cookies.
privacy.s5Body: Guests capture and submit media themselves. Nothing records in the background, and the microphone and camera are used only while the guest is actively capturing. By submitting a photo, clip or voice wish, a guest agrees that the host and, after the reveal, the event's guests will see or hear it. If something shouldn't be there, the host can remove it at any time.
privacy.contact: Questions or removal requests: write to the event's host, or contact us at hello@korme.org.

try.title: Your camera is already waiting.
try.subtitle: The same camera guests get after scanning the QR: photo, a short clip or a voice wish. Every take stays on your device.
try.afterShot: Developed. At a real event this lands in the shared gallery, hidden until the reveal.
try.denied: Allow camera access in your browser to try the demo.
try.voiceHint: Up to {seconds}s. Tap the button and say your wish.
try.voiceListen: Listen back. At a real event this would join the gallery.
try.micDenied: Allow microphone access in your browser to try voice wishes.
